stemHtml: Select the best strategy for effectively managing stress during flight.

options.a: In single-pilot operations, under stress, call the passengers to ask if someone can take the controls while you contact the company.
options.b: Effectively use all available resources - including your physical and mental state, information, equipment, crew members, ATC, and automation.
options.c: Delegate all tasks to other crew members and avoid using automation or personal skills.
options.d: Rely solely on automation to manage all tasks and reduce pilot workload.
